# Chapter 9: Corrosion and degradation  (~100 pp)
- 9.1 Corrosion mechanisms: galvanic, pitting, crevice, intergranular (18) · 9.2 Stress-corrosion cracking (15) · 9.3 Protection: coatings, cathodic protection, alloy choice, design (18) · 9.4 Wear: abrasive, adhesive, erosive (15) · 9.5 Radiation damage (12) · 9.6 Polymer ageing revisited (10) · 9.7 Failure section: corrosion-driven catastrophic failures (Aloha 243, Mianus River Bridge, Erika) (12)

**Archetype**: failure, transport. **Project**: corrode three samples in three environments; measure rates. **Exercises**: 30.
